title: ジャパンダートダービーの後に・立心

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Now that I've finished the Japan DD, I've figured
out what it is that makes Umamusume so cute and
divine...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's because they're always earnestly chasing their
dreams! I wanna be like that too, so I can stand
next to Opera O and Doto one day!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Now I have to get ready to race against King and
the other senior runners in the Mile
Championship! King actually ran in this race last
year too. I can't wait! ☆
